---
title: "graph_significance"
output: pdf_document
date: "2025-09-24"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

# read infant and null full graph stats

df_infant_RGB <- read.csv("../Fig2/data/PanelC/RGB_graphs/graphs_infant_RGB_10pct.csv", na.strings = c("", "NA")) 
df_G_null_RGB <- read.csv("../Fig2/data/PanelC/RGB_graphs/graphs_null_RGB_10pct.csv", na.strings = c("", "NA"))
df_S_null_RGB <- read.csv("../Fig2/data/PanelC/RGB_graphs/chunkedK1_label_shuffling_graphs_null_RGB_10pct.csv", na.strings = c("", "NA"))
df_ST_null_RGB <- read.csv("../Fig2/data/PanelC/RGB_graphs/chunkedK6_label_shuffling_graphs_null_RGB_10pct.csv", na.strings = c("", "NA"))

df_infant_GIST <- read.csv("../Fig2/data/PanelC/GIST_cosSim_graphs/graphs_infant_GIST_cosSim_10pct.csv", na.strings = c("", "NA"))
df_G_null_GIST <- read.csv("../Fig2/data/PanelC/GIST_cosSim_graphs/graphs_null_GIST_cosSim_10pct.csv", na.strings = c("", "NA"))
df_S_null_GIST <- read.csv("../Fig2/data/PanelC/GIST_cosSim_graphs/chunkedK1_label_shuffling_graphs_null_GIST_cosSim_10pct.csv", na.strings = c("", "NA"))
df_ST_null_GIST <- read.csv("../Fig2/data/PanelC/GIST_cosSim_graphs/chunkedK6_label_shuffling_graphs_null_GIST_cosSim_10pct.csv", na.strings = c("", "NA"))

df_infant_PE <- read.csv("../Fig2/data/PanelC/PE_graphs/graphs_infant_PE_10pct.csv", na.strings = c("", "NA"))
df_G_null_PE <- read.csv("../Fig2/data/PanelC/PE_graphs/graphs_null_PE_10pct.csv", na.strings = c("", "NA"))
df_S_null_PE <- read.csv("../Fig2/data/PanelC/PE_graphs/chunkedK1_label_shuffling_graphs_null_PE_10pct.csv", na.strings = c("", "NA"))
df_ST_null_PE <- read.csv("../Fig2/data/PanelC/PE_graphs/chunkedK6_label_shuffling_graphs_null_PE_10pct.csv", na.strings = c("", "NA"))

df_infant_Clip <- read.csv("../Fig2/data/PanelC/Clip_graphs/graphs_infant_Clip_10pct.csv", na.strings = c("", "NA"))
df_G_null_Clip <- read.csv("../Fig2/data/PanelC/Clip_graphs/graphs_null_Clip_10pct.csv", na.strings = c("", "NA"))
df_S_null_Clip <- read.csv("../Fig2/data/PanelC/Clip_graphs/chunkedK1_label_shuffling_graphs_null_Clip_10pct.csv", na.strings = c("", "NA"))
df_ST_null_Clip <- read.csv("../Fig2/data/PanelC/Clip_graphs/chunkedK6_label_shuffling_graphs_null_Clip_10pct.csv", na.strings = c("", "NA"))

cols_to_remove <- c("proportion_connected_nodes")

df_infant_RGB <- df_infant_RGB %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(cols_to_remove))
df_G_null_RGB <- df_G_null_RGB %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(cols_to_remove))
df_S_null_RGB <- df_S_null_RGB %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(cols_to_remove))
df_ST_null_RGB <- df_ST_null_RGB %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(cols_to_remove))

df_infant_GIST <- df_infant_GIST %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(cols_to_remove))
df_G_null_GIST <- df_G_null_GIST %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(cols_to_remove))
df_S_null_GIST <- df_S_null_GIST %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(cols_to_remove))
df_ST_null_GIST <- df_ST_null_GIST %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(cols_to_remove))

df_infant_PE <- df_infant_PE %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(cols_to_remove))
df_G_null_PE <- df_G_null_PE %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(cols_to_remove))
df_S_null_PE <- df_S_null_PE %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(cols_to_remove))
df_ST_null_PE <- df_ST_null_PE %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(cols_to_remove))

df_infant_Clip <- df_infant_Clip %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(cols_to_remove))
df_G_null_Clip <- df_G_null_Clip %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(cols_to_remove))
df_S_null_Clip <- df_S_null_Clip %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(cols_to_remove))
df_ST_null_Clip <- df_ST_null_Clip %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(cols_to_remove))
```


```{r}
sort_and_filter_complete <- function(...) {
  dfs <- list(...)
  dfs <- lapply(dfs, function(df) df[order(df$subj, df$category), , drop = FALSE])
  keys <- lapply(dfs, function(df) paste(df$subj, df$category, sep = "\r"))
  stopifnot(all(vapply(dfs[-1], function(df) {
    identical(keys[[1]], paste(df$subj, df$category, sep = "\r"))
  }, logical(1))))
  keep <- Reduce(`&`, lapply(dfs, complete.cases))
  lapply(dfs, function(df) df[keep, , drop = FALSE])
}

dfs_RGB <- sort_and_filter_complete(df_infant_RGB, df_G_null_RGB, df_S_null_RGB, df_ST_null_RGB)
df_infant_RGB <- dfs_RGB[[1]]
df_G_null_RGB <- dfs_RGB[[2]]
df_S_null_RGB <- dfs_RGB[[3]]
df_ST_null_RGB <- dfs_RGB[[4]]

dfs_GIST <- sort_and_filter_complete(df_infant_GIST, df_G_null_GIST, df_S_null_GIST, df_ST_null_GIST)
df_infant_GIST <- dfs_GIST[[1]]
df_G_null_GIST <- dfs_GIST[[2]]
df_S_null_GIST <- dfs_GIST[[3]]
df_ST_null_GIST <- dfs_GIST[[4]]

dfs_PE <- sort_and_filter_complete(df_infant_PE, df_G_null_PE, df_S_null_PE, df_ST_null_PE)
df_infant_PE <- dfs_PE[[1]]
df_G_null_PE <- dfs_PE[[2]]
df_S_null_PE <- dfs_PE[[3]]
df_ST_null_PE <- dfs_PE[[4]]

dfs_Clip <- sort_and_filter_complete(df_infant_Clip, df_G_null_Clip, df_S_null_Clip, df_ST_null_Clip)
df_infant_Clip <- dfs_Clip[[1]]
df_G_null_Clip <- dfs_Clip[[2]]
df_S_null_Clip <- dfs_Clip[[3]]
df_ST_null_Clip <- dfs_Clip[[4]]

# extremely inneficient :)
df_infant_RGB$dataset <- "Infant"
df_G_null_RGB$dataset <- "G-Null"
df_S_null_RGB$dataset <- "S-Null"
df_ST_null_RGB$dataset <- "ST-Null"

df_infant_RGB$visual_feat <- "RGB"
df_G_null_RGB$visual_feat <- "RGB"
df_S_null_RGB$visual_feat <- "RGB"
df_ST_null_RGB$visual_feat <- "RGB"

df_infant_GIST$dataset <- "Infant"
df_G_null_GIST$dataset <- "G-Null"
df_S_null_GIST$dataset <- "S-Null"
df_ST_null_GIST$dataset <- "ST-Null"

df_infant_GIST$visual_feat <- "GIST"
df_G_null_GIST$visual_feat <- "GIST"
df_S_null_GIST$visual_feat <- "GIST"
df_ST_null_GIST$visual_feat <- "GIST"

df_infant_PE$dataset <- "Infant"
df_G_null_PE$dataset <- "G-Null"
df_S_null_PE$dataset <- "S-Null"
df_ST_null_PE$dataset <- "ST-Null"

df_infant_PE$visual_feat <- "PE-Spatial"
df_G_null_PE$visual_feat <- "PE-Spatial"
df_S_null_PE$visual_feat <- "PE-Spatial"
df_ST_null_PE$visual_feat <- "PE-Spatial"

df_infant_Clip$dataset <- "Infant"
df_G_null_Clip$dataset <- "G-Null"
df_S_null_Clip$dataset <- "S-Null"
df_ST_null_Clip$dataset <- "ST-Null"

df_infant_Clip$visual_feat <- "CLIP"
df_G_null_Clip$visual_feat <- "CLIP"
df_S_null_Clip$visual_feat <- "CLIP"
df_ST_null_Clip$visual_feat <- "CLIP"

df_all <- rbind(
            df_infant_RGB, df_G_null_RGB, df_S_null_RGB, df_ST_null_RGB, 
            df_infant_GIST, df_G_null_GIST, df_S_null_GIST, df_ST_null_GIST, 
            df_infant_PE, df_G_null_PE, df_S_null_PE, df_ST_null_PE,
            df_infant_Clip, df_G_null_Clip, df_S_null_Clip, df_ST_null_Clip
            )
df_all$dataset <- factor(df_all$dataset, levels = c("G-Null", "S-Null", "ST-Null", "Infant"))
df_all$visual_feat <- factor(df_all$visual_feat, levels = c("RGB", "GIST", "PE-Spatial", "CLIP"))
```

# plots
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

features_to_plot <- c("overall_avg_connectivity", "avg_degree") #"avg_degree"   "overall_avg_connectivity"

name_map <- c(
  "avg_degree" = "Avg Degree",
  "overall_avg_connectivity" = "Connectivity"
)

# do infant and null full graphs
# gather features into long form
df_long_all <- df_all %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(subj, category, dataset, visual_feat), # keep subj, category, dataset, melt the rest
    names_to = "feature",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  filter(feature %in% features_to_plot)

# average across categories, per subj + dataset + feature
# df_avg_all <- df_long_all %>%
  # group_by(subj, dataset, feature) %>%
  # summarise(mean_value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# sum across subjects per dataset × category × feature
df_sum_all <- df_long_all %>%
  group_by(visual_feat, subj, category, dataset, feature) %>%
  summarise(total_value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# normalize within each feature × category
df_norm_all <- df_sum_all %>%
  group_by(visual_feat, subj, category, feature) %>%
  mutate(norm_value = total_value / max(total_value)) %>%
  # mutate(norm_value = total_value) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(feature = recode(feature, !!!name_map))  # apply shorter names

df_sd_all <- df_long_all %>%
  group_by(visual_feat, subj, category, feature) %>%
  mutate(norm_value = value / max(value)) %>%
  # mutate(norm_value = value) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(visual_feat, subj, dataset, feature) %>%
  summarize(sd_ = sd(norm_value), se_ = sd(norm_value) / sqrt(length(norm_value))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(feature = recode(feature, !!!name_map))  # apply shorter names

df_avg_norm_all <- df_norm_all %>%
  group_by(visual_feat, subj, dataset, feature) %>%
  summarise(mean_norm_value = mean(norm_value, na.rm = TRUE), sd_norm_value = sd(norm_value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

df_combined_all <- merge(df_avg_norm_all, df_sd_all, by = c("subj", "visual_feat", "dataset", "feature"))
```

```{r}
df_combined_all$dataset <- factor(df_combined_all$dataset, levels = c("G-Null", "S-Null","ST-Null", "Infant"))
df_combined_all$visual_feat <- factor(df_combined_all$visual_feat, levels = c("RGB", "GIST", "PE-Spatial", "CLIP"))
# sort by amount of data in descending order (subj with most data goes first)
df_combined_all$subj <- factor(df_combined_all$subj, levels = 
                                 c('030FD',
                                  '037SM',
                                  '046TE',
                                  '032SR',
                                  '038RB',
                                  '042MB',
                                  '045NA',
                                  '039ED',
                                  '047MS',
                                  '033SE',
                                  '043MP',
                                  '031HW',
                                  '036MR',
                                  '041EC'
                                  )
                                )
```

## Here is where we can easily generate Figs. S5 through S8 -- just change the visual feature
```{r}
feat_to_plot <- "PE-Spatial"
df_plot <- df_combined_all %>% filter(visual_feat == feat_to_plot)
print(df_plot)
```

```{r}
library(RColorBrewer)

# original R palette
# my_colors <- rep(c(full_palette[7], full_palette[6], full_palette[4]), length.out = 12)
# dimmer versions
# my_colors <- rep(c("#e5c4ab", "#f5d993", "#e5b9d6"), length.out = 12)
my_colors <- rep(c("grey60", "grey72", "grey85", "#e5b9d6"), length.out = 80)

# plot: Infant vs Null, averaged across categories
p <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = feature, y = mean_norm_value, fill = interaction(dataset, visual_feat))) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.82), width = 0.625, alpha = 1.) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_norm_value - se_, # sd_norm_value SD across cats or sd_ if corpus level
        ymax = mean_norm_value + se_),
    width = 0.2,                           # horizontal width of error bars
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.82), # matches bar dodging
    alpha = 1
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ subj, nrow = 5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  # labs(y = "Normalized value", x = NULL) +
  labs(y = "Absolute value", x = NULL) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 28, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 24),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 24),
    axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 20),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 14),
    strip.text   = element_text(size = 24),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(-2, "lines"),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey92"),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_line(color = "grey95")
) + 
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1.05),breaks = seq(0, 1.0, 0.25) )
  # scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 16),breaks = seq(0, 15, 5) )
  ggsave(paste0("infant_graphs_bySubj_", feat_to_plot, "_final.svg"), plot = p, width = 20, height = 12, dpi=300, device = "svg")
print(p)
```
```{r}

```
